translation.en: I want to lie on the sofa.

notes_md:
**nằm** = to lie down, to be in a lying position (body flat or resting).  

Use it for people or animals lying on a bed, floor, sofa, etc. It also commonly means “to be located/situated” for places or objects (a house, city, building).  


Very common extended meaning: “to be in / fall within” a group, range, or plan (more abstract location).  

Opposite idea: **đứng** (to stand) — helpful contrast for body position.
exampleSentencesTranslated: After dinner, he likes to to lie down on the sofa and watch TV.
She often to lie down and read books before going to sleep at night.
The doctor advised her to to lie down and rest if she feels tired.
exampleSentences: Sau khi ăn tối, anh thích nằm trên ghế sofa xem tivi.
Em thường nằm đọc sách trước khi đi ngủ vào buổi tối.
Bác sĩ khuyên chị nên nằm nghỉ ngơi nếu cảm thấy mệt.

translation.en: She likes to lie on the grass.

content.sentence: Cô ấy thích ___ trên bãi cỏ.

definitions.es: Estar en una posición horizontal sobre una superficie.
definitions.en: To be in a horizontal position on a surface.
definitions.vi: Ở trong một vị trí nằm ngang trên một bề mặt.

example.en: I am lying on the bed.
